meta.title: Léo Sauvey — Freelance Developer | Websites, Apps, Custom Software
meta.description: Freelance developer based in Caen, France. I design and deliver tailored websites, apps and software. Remote-friendly.

hero.title: LÉO SAUVEY
hero.tagline: Freelance developer. I design and deliver tailored websites, apps and software.

about.title: About
about.p1: I'm 21, studying computer science at Supinfo (3rd year, RNCP degree expected in 2028). Based between Caen and Cherbourg, France, I work on-site or remote depending on what serves the project best.
about.p2: I design and ship websites, mobile and web apps, and custom software. The goal is always the same: deliver a tool that solves a real problem, whether it saves time day-to-day or unlocks something concrete inside a company.
about.p3: Detail-obsessed, good at picking up what a client doesn't say out loud, and as invested in the project as if it were my own. Outside of code, I'm really into sports and love good food and good company — it helps keep a cool head when a sprint goes sideways.

stack.title: Main stack
stack.subtitle: The tech I use day-to-day. I touch others, but these I really master.

projects.title: Selected work
projects.subtitle: A representative sample. Happy to walk through any of these in more depth.

supify.tagline: Music-focused social network with integrated mini-games.
supify.description: Supify is a music-centric social network. Users share discoveries, engage around tracks, and play integrated real-time music mini-games. Main ongoing project.

libreo.tagline: Literary discovery web app with an editorial, premium design.
libreo.description: Libreo helps users explore and discover books through a polished, premium-magazine-inspired interface. Typography-driven navigation, editorial layout.

lsv-prono.tagline: Web app to track your betting evolution and performance.
lsv-prono.description: LSV Prono logs your sports bets, visualizes your evolution over time, and analyzes performance through dedicated charts.

photographer-site.description: Showcase website with polished photo gallery and smooth navigation, designed to highlight a photographer's work.

mkagain777.tagline: E-commerce site for a beatmaker selling productions to rappers.
mkagain777.description: Platform enabling a beatmaker to sell instrumentals: catalog, licensing, payments, order management. Work in progress.

nutriscan.tagline: Mobile app: photograph your meal, get full nutrition data to track your diet.
nutriscan.description: Nutriscan uses image recognition to identify food from a photo and instantly provides nutrition data (calories, macros, micros). Built to simplify daily diet tracking.

contact.title: Let's work together?
contact.subtitle: A project, an idea, a question. Email is the simplest way.
